Product: Whats App (Zinc)

Category: Crop Nutrition

Type: Micronutrient fertilizer

Crops: rice, wheat, maize, cotton, sugarcane, vegetables

Controls / Solves: 

Diseases: 

Weeds: 

Nutrient deficiency: 

Description:
High quality zinc fertilizer that corrects zinc deficiency and khaira disease and boosts crop growth and yield.

Recommendation:
Apply 4 kg per acre at early growth stage or when deficiency symptoms appear.
